data.title: Litecoin Structural Integrity: Long-Term Trendline Remains Unbroken Since 2020
data.description:
The Boss, a crypto analyst, recently noted on a X post that Litecoin (LTC) is firmly holding its long-term upward trend that began back in 2020. According to his analysis, LTC has consistently bounced off this key ascending trendline, highlighting its ongoing relevance in the current market structure. As price action continues to respect this support, The Boss points out that the next crucial zones to watch are the yellow lines representing potential resistance areas marked by Fibonacci levels that could shape LTC’s next major move. Positive Technical Indicators In his analysis, The Boss stated that Litecoin’s momentum is strengthening, as reflected by the RSI (Relative Strength Index), which is currently around 64
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/litecoin-long-term-trendline/

data.title: ADA Holds Steady as Analyst Eyes Next Leg Up: Can Cardano Still Flip Ethereum in 2025?
data.description:
The cryptocurrency ADA, also known as Cardano, remains stable in its market performance, drawing attention from analysts who are closely monitoring its potential for future growth. As these experts examine the current trends and developments within the cryptocurrency space, the question arises: Is there a possibility that Cardano could surpass Ethereum, the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, by the year 2025? This inquiry prompts a deeper analysis of both platforms, their innovative technologies, and the broader market dynamics that could influence their standings in the coming years.
source: https://blocknews.com/ada-holds-steady-as-analyst-eyes-next-leg-up-can-cardano-still-flip-ethereum-in-2025/

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: Cryptocurrency market inflows have reached $60 billion so far this year, and investors' interest in altcoins has increased
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to JPMorgan analysts, capital inflows into digital assets have reached $60 billion since the beginning of the year, mainly driven by inflows from crypto funds, active futures trading at CME, and venture capital fundraising activities. Analysts pointed out that since the end of May, capital inflows have increased by nearly 50%, and are expected to easily surpass last year's record. 
Analysts said that the friendlier regulatory environment in the United States is one of the key driving factors. Investors' interest in altcoins is also rising. Among them, Ethereum is the biggest beneficiary due to its dominance in decentralized finance (DeFi) and smart contracts, and it is increasingly being included in corporate treasury allocations along with Bitcoin. More and more asset management companies are interested in launching crypto ETFs based on altcoins and introducing pledge mechanisms. (The Block)

data.title: GameSquare acquires CryptoPunks for $5.15M, stirs NFT treasury talk
data.description:
GameSquare (GAME) acquired item #5577 from the CryptoPunks collection for $5. 15M in preferred shares. GameSquare already holds ETH as a treasury, and has hinted at using valuable NFT as collateral.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gamesquare-nft-treasury-buys-cryptopunks/
